---
title: "Rancho San Antonio Trail Run, Cupertino"
description: "9.67 mi, 1,545 ft EG on Rancho San Antonio trails — 3 hours of daylight, well spent."
author: "synesis"
date: "2025-03-02"
categories: [running, trail running, video, personal]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Watch the run on YouTube. [Watch on YouTube](https://youtu.be/Ijdt4Ks2TNE)](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

This Sunday I only had ~3 hours before sunset in Cupertino, so I went as far as I could on beautiful Rancho San Antonio trails: 9.67 miles with 1,545ft EG, time 1:42:34, pace 10'36"/mi. But only ~6mi was on trails -- the rest was just running back to hotel. Enjoy my [running recap video](https://youtu.be/Ijdt4Ks2TNE)!


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_video-running-trailrunning-activity-7302200648970686464-qi_G).*
